channel.title: Filesystem on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Filesystem on Arrans github.io

item.title: sharkdp/fd
item.description: A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to ‘find’

item.title: yorukot/superfile
item.description: Pretty fancy and modern terminal file manager

item.title: rfjakob/gocryptfs
item.description: Encrypted overlay filesystem written in Go

item.title: dundee/gdu
item.description: Fast disk usage analyzer with console interface written in Go

item.title: juicedata/juicefs
item.description: JuiceFS is a distributed POSIX file system built on top of Redis and S3.

item.title: muesli/duf
item.description: Disk Usage/Free Utility - a better ‘df’ alternative

item.title: hack-pad/hackpadfs
item.description: An extensible file system abstraction for Go. File systems, composable interfaces, and test suites.
